title: hieracium oxyodon subsp. tomense
intro: Hieracium oxyodon subsp. tomense is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is commonly known as a wild hawkweed. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, Hieracium oxyodon subsp. tomense is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds in a solvent.
